name: Rupa
description: __Height:__ 169 cm A slightly tanned girl who has a South Asian father and a Japanese mother. She has an artistic sense, and a clear-headed mind. She is a so-called genius that everyone respects for her gentle and modest demeanor. Her only flaws is that she is a heavy drinker, and gets tunnel vision when she has a goal in mind.

name: Bouryoku no Majin
description: He is a Fiend and Public Safety Devil Hunter from Special Division 4. Despite his moniker as the Violence Fiend, he is extremely polite and straightforward. He apologized to [Beam](https://anilist.co/character/157232/Beam) after hitting him in self-defense and told the [Spider Devil](https://anilist.co/character/157277/Prinz) to evacuate the area when he mistook her for a human lady. ~!He is later partnered with [Kobeni Higashiyama](https://anilist.co/character/144594/Higashiyama-Kobeni) followi

name: Kirara Hoshi
description: A third-year student at Tokyo Jujutsu High who is currently suspended for clashing with authority. While away from the school, Kirara has partnered with [Kinji](https://anilist.co/character/197584) while running his fight club. Their cursed technique is Interstellar Flight (Love Rendezvous), a complex technique whose motif is based on the Southern Cross constellation.

Syaro is a sensitive and bashful girl who has insecurities when it comes to her image. She is easily flustered and worries that her friends think she is a rich and sophisticated lady when in actuality she is a regular girl living in a humble home. name: Taichi Ichinose
description: An ordinary high school student. Ichinose used to be Mita's best friend, but they drifted apart during high school. They get closer again when they end up in the same classroom. He is usually shy and meek, but is known for being extremely nice.

name: Crowley Eusford
nativeName: クローリー・ユースフォード
description: Crowley is a Thirteenth Progenitor among vampires and a member of Seventh Progenitor Ferid Bathory's faction. However, he hides his strength under Ferid's orders and is actually equal in strength to a Seventh Progenitor. Crowley is calm and brave which makes him a patient vampire who enjoys fighting any opponent. Even when he is in a tight spot, he remains calm with a pleasant smile. Despite sticking to Ferid, he appears to be emotionally detached from him, such as throwing the latter out of the

name: Desscaras
description: Desscaras is a powerful magic user in this world where Majik, a living force, grants power through difficult trials. She is confident and skilled, often taking charge of dangerous missions like confronting King Uroro, a destructive Majik. Despite her serious nature, Desscaras sometimes dismisses caution, preferring to handle matters on her own.

name: Hikari Takanashi
description: A highly energetic vampire. She usually avoids biting other people's necks, instead drinking blood packs sent by the government and using blood substitutes like tomato juice. Contrary to myths, she loves eating garlic and merely dislikes bright lights. She occasionally has the urge to nibble on someone, usually her sister. Despite her lackadaisical nature, she often strives to help others in need. She's 15 years old.
mediaTitles: Interviews with Monster Girls: The Demi-chans' Summer Break

description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5'6") __Talent:__ Ultimate Mechanic A student of Hope's Peak Academy's Class 77-B, and a participant of the Killing School Trip. Kazuichi is a highly emotional character, though he tries to play it smooth and acts carefree at first. He is a very jumpy person, easily scared and often screaming in fear. description: __Height:__ 167 cm (5'6") A tall girl that Rintarou bumps into in Akihabara and is on a search for the IBN 5100 personal computer. Moeka is extremely protective of her mobile phone and becomes agitated if someone tries to take it from her hands. name: Neco-Arc
description: Neco-Arc is a running TYPE-MOON parody character that has been going since Tsukihime, and is a cat version of Arcueid Brunestud.

name: Semiu Grier
description: __Affiliation:__ Cleaners __Height:__ 175 cm + 8 cm Heels __Jinki:__ "Eyes" Semiu is very confident and professional, preferring to get on with things as quickly as possible. She is dedicated to her job, being at the janitors desk and picking up calls as soon as dawn strikes. She says to Rudo that his stability using a jinki is high, so he needs to train it. Semiu's jinki is unique in the sense it is not used as a weapon to take down Aberrant Beasts, but rather as a tool to assess a Givers poten

name: Tsurugi no Otome
description: A former gold-ranked adventurer who currently serves as the Temple of Law's Archbishop of the Supreme God.

name: Denken
description: Denken is an imperial mage of the second-class. In his youth he belonged to an army but became an imperial mage after winning a power struggle. Often calm and calculating, however he still has a fire burning within despite his old age. He saw Frieren as his motivation to become a mage. ~!Becomes a first-class mage after the examination.!~

name: Kinrou
description: Kinrou is the elder brother of [Ginrou](https://anilist.co/character/143270/Ginrou) and the son of Tetsuken and Shirogane. Originally having served as one of the guards of Ishigami Village alongside Ginrou, he quickly joined Senku as a member of the Kingdom of Science. Kinrou is a muscular young man of average height, with a scar on the right side of his face and a cluster of hair hanging in between his eyes. He wears a sleeveless karate gi-like uniform with a belt and a buckler with a star patt

name: Lily Hoshikawa
description: ~! __Death:__ November 30, 2011 __Cause of death:__ mental shock from growing a facial hair !~ Lily is often seen with a smile, and due to her young age, is shown to be quite playful as well. She has also demonstrated a professional aspect from her experiences before her death.

name: Ritsu Kawai
description: Ritsu is a 2nd year high school student who lives in the same dorm with Usa. She is a seemingly shy girl who likes to read books. Her grandfather is brother to landlady of their dorm who views Ritsu as her relative. She is trusted with looking after the dorm when landlady takes a leave. She keeps multiple weapons around the house and doesn't hesitate to use them if one of the guys crosses into girls side of the house.

name: Kaname Sudou
description: __Sigil:__ Flame God's Hammer __Clan:__ Sunset Ravens He was sent a help request by Kyouda Hiroyuki and joined the Darwin's Game. He is only interested in surviving. His sigil allows him to forge any weapon. However, it can't be too complicated.

name: Rinko Shirokane
description: __Height:__ 157 cm (5'2") __Instruments:__ Roland FA-08 and Roland AX-Synth (Black) The student council president of Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and the last member to join Roselia as their keyboardist. She is also part of the library committee at school. Rinko is very shy, and is at first scared of the idea of performing in a live concert.
